_comment: DUMMY DATA — Sample Wazuh alert for rule 117001 (port scan)

rule.description: NetFlow: Possible port scanning from 192.168.56.20 — multiple destination ports detected

analyst_notes: Port scan pattern: 192.168.56.20 connected to 25+ unique ports on 192.168.56.30 within 60 seconds. Investigate: authorized vulnerability scan? EDR/endpoint logs on source host? Network access policy?
